title: Dungeons and Taverns Pillager Outpost Overhaul
description: Standalone split version of the Pillager Outpost Overhaul from Dungeons and Taverns
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

This standalone split version of the Pillager Outpost Rework, originally in Dungeons and Taverns, Overhauls the Pillager Outpost by adding 2 new plate types, 4 new tower types and a few more loot chest types and decoration structure parts
